goals.short_name: British Columbians have access to clean, reliable and affordable electricity

main_services.name: Get information about B.C.'s electricity supply and clean energy projects
Get a rebate for an EV charger

goals.short_name: Homes, buildings and businesses use less energy and save money

main_services.name: Improve your business's or building's energy efficiency

goals.short_name: Industry reduces greenhouse gas emissions and B.C. tracks its climate progress

main_services.name: Comply with industrial carbon pricing and emissions reporting

goals.short_name: B.C.'s oil, gas and low-carbon fuel resources are developed responsibly

main_services.name: Develop petroleum and natural gas resources
Supply low-carbon and renewable transportation fuels

acts.summary: Sets B.C.'s electricity self-sufficiency and clean/renewable generation targets and guides provincial energy planning.

sections.title: Electricity self-sufficiency and clean generation targets
sections.description: Requires the Province to plan for electricity self-sufficiency and sets clean and renewable energy generation targets.

services.name: Learn about B.C.'s electricity supply and clean energy sources
services.ms_name: Get information about B.C.'s electricity supply and clean energy projects

services.name: Plan and oversee provincial electricity system growth and reliability

acts.summary: Regulates public utilities in B.C., including BC Hydro rates, service standards, and infrastructure approvals.

sections.title: Regulation of public utilities and rates
sections.description: Establishes the B.C. Utilities Commission's authority to regulate utility rates, service and infrastructure approvals.

services.name: Plan and oversee provincial electricity system growth and reliability

acts.summary: Sets legislated greenhouse gas reduction targets and an accountability framework, including annual public reporting and an independent advisory body. Renamed from the Greenhouse Gas Reduction Targets Act in 2019.

sections.title: Independent advisory body
sections.description: Provides for an independent expert advisory body — the Climate Solutions Council — to advise government on climate action and clean economic growth.

services.name: Provide independent advice on climate action and clean economic growth

sections.title: Targets and accountability reporting
sections.description: Sets 2030, 2040 and 2050 emissions reduction targets and requires an annual Climate Change Accountability Report on progress.

services.name: Report annually on B.C.'s climate change accountability progress

acts.full_name: Greenhouse Gas Industrial Reporting and Control Act
acts.summary: Requires large industrial operations to report greenhouse gas emissions and establishes the B.C. Output-Based Pricing System compliance framework.

sections.title: Reporting operations and compliance obligations
sections.description: Defines reporting and regulated operations and their emissions reporting and compliance obligations.

services.name: Report your industrial greenhouse gas emissions
services.ms_name: Comply with industrial carbon pricing and emissions reporting

services.name: Register your operation in the B.C. Industrial Emissions Reporting System
services.ms_name: Comply with industrial carbon pricing and emissions reporting

acts.summary: Establishes B.C.'s Low Carbon Fuel Standard, requiring fuel suppliers to meet renewable and low-carbon fuel targets and enabling a compliance credit market. Replaced the Greenhouse Gas Reduction (Renewable and Low Carbon Fuel Requirements) Act effective January 1, 2024.

sections.title: Fuel supplier compliance and reporting
sections.description: Sets fuel supplier targets, carbon intensity approval process, and annual compliance reporting requirements.

services.name: Report compliance under the Low Carbon Fuel Standard
services.ms_name: Supply low-carbon and renewable transportation fuels

services.name: Apply to have your fuel's carbon intensity approved
services.ms_name: Supply low-carbon and renewable transportation fuels

sections.title: Credit market and compliance units
sections.description: Enables registered parties to generate, transfer and trade compliance credits and debits.

services.name: Trade Low Carbon Fuel Standard credits
services.ms_name: Supply low-carbon and renewable transportation fuels

acts.summary: Governs provincial ownership and disposition of petroleum and natural gas resources, including tenure agreements and royalties.

sections.title: Tenure dispositions and Crown sales
sections.description: Governs monthly Crown tenure dispositions, bidding, and title administration for petroleum and natural gas rights.

services.name: Bid for petroleum and natural gas tenure rights
services.ms_name: Develop petroleum and natural gas resources

services.name: Search petroleum and natural gas title records
services.ms_name: Develop petroleum and natural gas resources

sections.title: Royalty and freehold production tax framework
sections.description: Establishes the royalty and freehold production tax regime for petroleum and natural gas production.

services.name: Pay petroleum and natural gas royalties
services.ms_name: Develop petroleum and natural gas resources

acts.summary: Sets minimum energy performance standards for prescribed products, equipment and appliances sold or manufactured in B.C.

sections.title: Minimum energy performance standards
sections.description: Authorizes regulations prescribing energy devices and minimum energy performance standards, and information/reporting requirements for manufacturers.

services.name: Set and enforce minimum energy performance standards for products and equipment
